title: Aether on Station API
description: Porting Aether from b1.7.3 Risugami to Babric + StationAPI
body:
# Aether b1.7.3 ported onto Station API
Depends on [Babric](https://babric.github.io/), [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/StationAPI), and [AccessoryAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessory-api)
### Please support original project! They are awesome! [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether/)
Subscribe to their patreon if you love this mod! :)
## Enter the Portal into a different dimension
Create an Aether Portal with a glowstone frame and a water bucket!
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9XSScuqN/images/751c365226c88118776a5278ad2b882597511cc5.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9XSScuqN/images/751c365226c88118776a5278ad2b882597511cc5.png)
## Explore the Aether!
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9XSScuqN/images/668891d6e0dc26df8389e6c7f5283d79df2997b1.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9XSScuqN/images/668891d6e0dc26df8389e6c7f5283d79df2997b1.png)
### Read about how to use the aether v1.02, which this is based on
[Original Minecraft Forum Post](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1275355-1-7-3-aether-collaboration-mod-v1-02-new-mobs)
